headline: Healthpeak Properties Q1 FFOA Tops Estimates on Steady Leasing Momentum
summary: DOC beats Q1 FFOA estimates as leasing stays strong and Janus Living IPO boosts growth, prompting a higher 2026 outlook.

headline: VNO Q1 FFO Meets Estimates, Revenues Top, Same-Store NOI Grows
summary: VNO posts in-line Q1 FFO as leasing, NOI and occupancy rise in key portfolios, while deals, buybacks and refinancing reshape its balance sheet.
